key_technical_questions.heading: Key Technical Questions
bullets: Provisioning path — Find a Principal Engineer or Staff Engineer on the SmartFiles product team (Data Management / Platform Engineering). Does SmartFiles support automated cluster provisioning via REST API or Terraform provider on Hyper-V, and can a single-node virtual edition be spun up with a time-limited NFR license key for isolated lab environments that auto-expire after 4-8 hours?

API surface for scoring — Find a Senior Engineer or API lead on the SmartFiles team (Platform Engineering). Can the Cohesity REST API (v2) programmatically validate SmartFiles-specific configurations — e.g., confirm a SmartFiles View exists with a specific NFS/SMB share policy, verify tiering rules to an external cloud target, and read object counts or data reduction ratios — so we can auto-score learner tasks without SSH access to the cluster?

NFR licensing & multi-tenancy — Find the Director of Partner Enablement or Cohesity Academy lead (Customer Education / Alliances). Does Cohesity offer bulk NFR or lab-purpose license keys for SmartFiles virtual editions that support concurrent multi-tenant lab instances (50-200 simultaneous learners), and is there a programmatic license activation endpoint or does each cluster require manual registration through the Cohesity support portal?

conversation_starters.heading: Conversation Starters
bullets: SmartFiles sits at the intersection of data governance and user behavior—your customers need to actually *see* how policies work across hybrid environments before they deploy, otherwise you're looking at misconfigured access controls and compliance gaps that show up months later.

The Hyper-V integration piece is tricky enough that hands-on labs let your partners and customers validate their specific backup and recovery workflows without risking production data—that confidence translates directly to faster adoption and fewer support tickets.
